data.raceName: HAHN SUPER DRY PROVINCIAL MAIDEN PLATE
data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. PELEUS has improved since being gelded, and he will be peaking third-up. He closed strongly first-up for second, then was sent to town and was not disgraced when fourth over 1200m at Rosehill. Dropping back to 1100m off a freshen up is ideal, and he is the one to beat for us. 10. ROYAL BOTANIC is an Ole Kirk filly on debut for Kris Lees and has impressed in her last two trials. She maps to receive a soft run, and she looks ready to run a big race. 6. SANT GERVASI was around the mark in all four starts of his initial prep and should have strengthened over the break. A recent Hawkesbury trial fifth will have him ready to rumble fresh on his home track. 7. SMOKE 'N' DARTS showed good early speed on debut here and stuck on gamely for second behind a smart type. He had won a trial before that, and despite copping a tough gate, he can figure in the finish again.","runners":[5,10,6,7],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: HAWKESBURY-R2-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
